user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel buffet to start the day before the meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position 0 places breakfast before the 9AM meeting. Scheduled 7:30-8:30AM to allow time to eat and prepare.
